calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Deposition Fee
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIC STEPHENSON, ESQ. of Crosby & Rowell LLP, Tel No. 510-267-0300 appearing for Defendant The Regents of the University of California;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Having read and considered the motion, including the memorandum of points and authorities, all timely submitted admissible evidence, IT IS ORDERED THAT Defendant The Regents of the University of California's unopposed motion to set the deposition fee of Dr. Jamasbi to the rate of $312.50 per hour is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Naomi Gray, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Deposition Fee
Off Calendar Aug-13-2015 Continued To Aug-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA''S Motion To Set Deposition Fee is continued to August 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302, Discovery Calendar to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 13, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
